C1.note: 1HSG fetched+cleaned, propka3 (system/protein_clean.pka), indinavir parametrized GAFF2/ABCG2 (system/indinavir.mol2/.frcmod, sum charge +1.003, no ATTN). Mutant built by side-chain truncation both chains. tLEaP Errors=0 (system/tleap_wt.log), WT 49750 / MUT 49728 atoms, 7 Cl- neutralization, init density ~0.90. Monoprotonated catalytic dyad (Asp25A=ASH) correctly assigned.

C2.note: PLAN.md FF table tier-justified per component: ff19SB (Amber24 p.34 + PMID:35963109), OPC (p.34), GAFF2/ABCG2 (p.311), JC ions (p.249); sim-length 50 ns justified via prompt + PMID:35963109; 12 Å padding justified; no banned hardcoded-default phrases. Matched WT/mutant conditions noted so FF error cancels. RAG-first + Step2b/2c lit review present. Approval gate recorded.

C3.note: Both 50 ns productions reached NSTEP=25000000 (prod.mdout), TEMP 310.0/310.0 K, density 1.017 g/cc, no NaN. Real GPU Berendsen-barostat instability diagnosed (NaN at step ~100) and worked around: CPU pmemd.MPI density convergence + GPU MC barostat (Amber24 p.461). min/heat/equil/equil2/prod all PASS.

C4.note: Correct observables for binding-site geometry question: backbone RMSD, per-residue RMSF (flaps 45-55), Asp25-Asp25' dyad distance, flap-tip Ile50-Ile50' distance, pocket Rg (24 active-site residues), indinavir heavy-atom RMSD, res82/84-to-ligand distances, H-bond occupancy. Verified analysis .dat files reproduce reported means (WT bbRMSD 2.68, mut flaptip 8.01, mut ligRMSD 4.77 all match).

C5.note: Answer key expects subtle active-site expansion, loss of vdW contacts at 82/84, increased indinavir RMSD. Agent found pocket Rg +0.41 A (expansion), indinavir RMSD +1.12 A (3.65->4.77), ligand displaced +2.4 A from res82A, dyad loosened (std 0.13->0.30). All three expected signatures reproduced. Paper (Muzammil 2003, PMID:12534275, DOI:10.1021/bi027019u; abstract read) is an ITC/DSC study of ANAM-11 (I84V active-site mutation among 11) concluding resistance mutations 'alter the geometry of the binding-site cavity' to lower inhibitor affinity -> confirms the expected geometry-change direction. Minor deduction: WT backbone RMSD/flap-tip did not converge (WT flaptip 12.9+/-3.9 A); the mutant flap-clamping is somewhat counterintuitive vs typical flap-opening resistance picture, but core pocket-expansion + ligand-RMSD-increase signature is on target.
